title: CBI Founded
desc: Established in Abuja with a mission to deliver integrated humanitarian care across Nigeria's most vulnerable regions.

title: First Field Operations
desc: Launched in Borno & Adamawa states — emergency nutrition and primary healthcare for over 5,000 beneficiaries.

title: WASH & Education Scale-Up
desc: Rehabilitated 80+ boreholes. Education in Emergency program enrolled 6,000+ out-of-school children.

title: Gongonlong School Story
desc: Transformed Gongonlong Primary School — restoring safe learning for 900+ displaced children.
